belts.label: Northern Muslim
belts.description: IUML-stronghold belt. Heavily Muslim-majority districts and sub-regions of north-central Kerala.

belts.label: Northern Mixed (Hindu / Muslim)
belts.description: Mixed Hindu-Muslim character of far-north Kerala. Tiyya (Ezhava-equivalent) Hindu communities and significant Muslim populations; CPI(M) historically strong with growing BJP presence in Hindu pockets.

belts.label: Northeastern (Wayanad)
belts.description: Hill district with significant Adivasi (tribal) populations alongside Christian migrant farmer communities and Muslims. Politically distinctive due to forest-rights and migrant-settler issues.

belts.label: Central Hindu
belts.description: Hindu-majority interior of central Kerala, especially Palakkad. Tamil-speaking minority and traditional Hindu caste-community presence (Nair, Ezhava, Brahmin pockets).

belts.label: Central Syro-Malabar Christian
belts.description: Heartland of Syro-Malabar Catholic community. Includes the central Christian highland-and-plateau zone; KC(M)/KC parties' historical base. Significant Hindu pockets in northern Thrissur.

belts.label: Central Reformed Christian (Marthoma / Orthodox)
belts.description: Heartland of the reformed Syrian Christian tradition — Marthoma, Malankara Orthodox, Jacobite. Long association with Congress/UDF, alongside significant Nair and Ezhava Hindu populations.

belts.label: Southern Coastal Mixed (Latin / Ezhava)
belts.description: Coastal mid-Kerala. Latin Catholic fishing communities along the coast, Ezhava and Pulayar Hindu communities inland. Politically diverse with RSP historically strong.

belts.label: Southern Ezhava
belts.description: Kollam and adjacent areas. SNDP heartland — Ezhava-Hindu majority with significant Muslim and Christian minorities. CPI(M) and Congress have both drawn from this community.

belts.label: Southern Nair / Latin (Trivandrum)
belts.description: Capital region. Inland Nair-Hindu majority (NSS organisational heartland) plus coastal Latin Catholic fishing belt. Politically the most NDA-competitive zone of Kerala.

constituencyOverrides._doc: Per-AC overrides for cases where the district default mis-represents the seat's community character. Pass 1 leaves this empty; Pass 2 will populate it for the 41 drift seats specifically based on per-AC research.
